name: Seasoning for Breadmaker Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Brush the mixture onto soft pretzels just before baking.
See Pretzels for the Breadmaker recipe.
This seasoning can also be used on homemade breadsticks.
Another variation is to brush the mixture onto regular hard pretzels and bake at 250 degrees F for 1 hour.
